commit.message:
Fix large-bar overlap: zone clipping, glow ring bounds, controls layout

- Add per-zone QPainter setClipRect() in paintEvent() — prevents any
  zone's content from bleeding into adjacent zones at large sizes
- Fix glow ring overflow: at size3 (h=128), ring_r reached 62px while
  dx was only rz.x()+31, painting 31px off the left widget edge;
  clamp dx to ensure rings stay within widget bounds
- Fix controls zone overlap: bw_ was unbounded (h//2 = 64 at size3),
  causing gear/close buttons to encroach on OBS label at 1920px;
  cap bw_ at zone_width//4 and compute label_right as fixed margin
  from button area so OBS label always has clear space
- At size3, disk warning now stacks vertically below OBS label

Frontend:

- ProjectDetail.tsx: replace static lookup with fetchProjectDetail API call

Migration: CREATE TABLE projects + INSERT 8 projects (run separately in DB)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Filter noise from SBOM summary: skip TryCompile and empty subbuilds

CMake try_compile() scratch dirs produce 1-component SBOMs with no
relationships, and FetchContent subbuild dirs produce empty SBOMs.
These entries are now filtered from the job summary to show only
meaningful build results. Prevents $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY size limit
errors on projects with many sub-builds (e.g. 49 entries → 2 real).

New filterMeaningfulEntries() function keeps entries with >1 component,
any relationships, or any artifacts. Skipped count is shown in overview.

commit.message:
Add analytics, forms, Stripe Connect, domains, auto-recharge, emails, duplicate pages, template categories, and prompt suggestions

- Email system: welcome, low credits, subscription, cancellation offer emails
- Duplicate pages: copy any page without using credits
- Template categories: filterable tabs with count badges
- Prompt suggestions: per-template clickable recommendation chips
- Template info popups: best-for, style, example prompt overlay
- Stripe Connect: users connect their Stripe to accept payments on landing pages
- Analytics dashboard: page views, leads, traffic charts, activity feed
- Form builder: create forms, embed in pages, capture leads, export CSV
- Webhook integration: forward form submissions to external URLs with HMAC signing
- Lead activity tracking: real-time feed of views, submissions, clicks
- Auto-recharge credits: auto-buy when balance drops below threshold
- Custom domain hosting: add domains, DNS verification, page assignment
- Subdomain management: custom slugs at {name}.gofunnel.io
- Page view tracking: non-blocking beacon on published pages
- Cancellation retention: 20% discount offer email on cancel attempt

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

3.0.0 (#55)

* Refactor: Remove unused imports and redundant null checks; simplify lambda expressions across multiple modules

* fix: extract WS protocol field names to shared constants (REA-26) (#50)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: correct typo in comment in `ReadingBatServer` module

* fix: extract isCorrect from Challenge DSL into ChallengeProgressService (REA-17) (#52)

Move the database query out of the DSL domain model class (Challenge)
into a dedicated service object (ChallengeProgressService) in the server
package. This decouples the content-definition layer from the persistence
layer, allowing challenge logic to be tested without database fixtures.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: make adminUsers thread-safe with AtomicReference<Set<String>> (REA-21) (#51)

Replace the non-volatile `var adminUsers: List<String>` with
`val adminUsers = AtomicReference<Set<String>>(emptySet())` to eliminate
the data race between startup writes and concurrent reader threads.
Uses HashSet for O(1) containment checks. Updated all call sites
(User.isAdminUser, SystemConfigurationPage) and tests.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: extract pub-sub publishing from User into AnswerPublisher service (REA-15) (#53)

Move publishAnswers and publishLikeDislike out of User.kt into a
dedicated AnswerPublisher object, removing the User class's compile-time
dependency on the WebSocket transport layer (ChallengeWs flows and
PubSubCommandsWs types). Update call sites in ChallengePost and
User.resetHistory to use AnswerPublisher instead.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: rename adminUsers to adminUsersRef and update usages (REA-21)

Simplify access to `adminUsers` by introducing a computed property instead of direct `load()` calls. Updated related code in `User`, `SystemConfigurationPage`, and tests to align with the refactor.

* fix: extract DB queries from ClassCode into ClassCodeRepository (REA-16) (#54)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add PostHog analytics, marketing pixels (Meta, Google Ads, LinkedIn, RB2B), and conversion tracking

- PostHog: Full analytics layer with custom events for contact form, CTA clicks, ROI calculator, pricing
- Meta Pixel: Facebook/Instagram retargeting and Lead conversion events
- Google Ads Tag: gtag.js with conversion tracking for contact form submissions
- LinkedIn Insight Tag: B2B retargeting (ready for partner ID)
- RB2B: Visitor identification for anonymous traffic (free tier, 150/month)
- All pixels env-var gated — silently skip if not configured
- Contact form fires trackConversion('lead') across all active pixels

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
UI refinements: Memory Log, contact cards, venue Events, auto-draft

1. Remove copy-message button from contact cards
2. Add "Edit Message" label text next to the edit icon
3. Add suggestion chips (Birthday, Hobbies, Partner, Family) in the
   notes section of the edit contact form with a textarea
4. Relabel Work/Home address fields to "neighborhood / address"
5. Rename Outreach Log → Memory Log with reflection field ("What was
   great about last time?") and photo upload per contact; move section
   to last position after Meeting Schedule
6. Plan Hangout now scrolls to Meet-Up Places section; add "Events"
   as 5th filter option alongside Midway/Closer to Me/Closer to Them/
   Anywhere in City, showing upcoming city events
7. Generate Suggestions now auto-drafts a message with top 3 venues
   or events to the Memory Log for easy sharing

commit.message:
Fix efficiency issues in addBlossom and prevent stack overflow in assignLabel

- Replace queue.push(...blossomLeaves(b)) with for-of loop to avoid
  stack overflow on large blossoms
- Cache slack values in addBlossom to eliminate redundant recomputation
- Track touched indices instead of filtering entire 2*nvertex array
- Fix typo in comment
- Bump version to 1.0.1

Fix price action: filter outlier spot prices from bad data

March 7 had 151/207 NIFTY snapshots with bogus spot prices (25k-27k
range instead of actual ~24,450), causing +11% phantom moves.

Added median-based outlier filter: rejects snapshots where spotPrice
deviates more than 3% from the day's median. This cleans bad data
at query time without needing DB cleanup.

commit.message:
Add dynamic stock list with Yahoo Finance sync

- exchange_stocks table stores dynamically discovered stocks
- sync-exchange-stocks edge function searches Yahoo Finance with
  200+ query patterns to discover all .ST tickers (~167 found)
- Frontend prioritizes DB table, falls back to hardcoded seed list
- Hardcoded list in exchangeStocks.ts acts as fallback only
- Sync caches for 24h, can be re-triggered to pick up new IPOs

commit.message:
feat: Click outside autosave - global behavior (v2.48)

Implement consistent "click outside = close + autosave" behavior across the app.

Changes:
- Add use-click-outside.ts hook with portal-aware detection
- Expand portal element detection in task-list.tsx
- Change Escape key behavior: now saves instead of resetting
  - task-item-expanded.tsx (title + notes)
  - checklist-item.tsx
- modal.tsx: blur active element before closing (triggers autosave)

Ignored portal elements:
- [data-radix-portal], [data-radix-popper-content-wrapper]
- [role="dialog"], [role="listbox"], [role="menu"]
- .rdp, [data-rdp] (react-day-picker)
- [data-floating-ui-portal]
- [data-sonner-toast], [data-toaster]

commit.message:
Restore icomoon font-face, remove contact form, fix placeholder text

PurgeCSS had removed the icomoon @font-face declaration, breaking all
icon-* icons site-wide. Restored with woff2+ttf sources and font-display:swap.
Removed contact form from /contact page (info only). Fixed CTA lorem ipsum.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: detect hostname and cwd changes via OSC escape sequences

Parse OSC 7 (file://hostname/path) and OSC 0/2 (window title) from PTY
output to detect cwd and hostname changes, especially useful when SSH'd
into remote machines. OSC 7 is trusted for both hostname and path; OSC
title is only used for path (hostname in title can be unreliable due to
conda etc). Skip local cwd polling when SSH'd to avoid overwriting
remote path. Display SSH hostname in tab when it differs from initial.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix disbursement: product pills only for CEO/RM, fix operator precedence

Investigation found:
- Column offsets (0,1,2 / 6,7,8) are correct
- Day/month parsing works (no cross-contamination)
- Product data (IGL/FIG/IL) only exists at region level in the file
- Showing parent region product data at DM/BM was misleading
  (IGL region total > All branch total)

Fix: DM/BM see only 'All' with correct district/branch data.
CEO/RM see product pills with correct region-level product data.
Also fixed operator precedence bug in section title skip logic.

commit.message:
Fix MapLike.isStyleLoaded return type to boolean | void

maplibre-gl v5 types isStyleLoaded() as boolean | void, not boolean.
Widening the interface type makes the hook compatible with maplibregl.Map
without a cast.
